profiles.intendedUse: Internal exchange of a staged OHT/IUCLID-aligned JSON preview for review workflows.
notes: Unsupported fields and derived mappings remain review items rather than blockers for internal exchange.

profiles.intendedUse: Consultation-oriented exchange of a staged OHT/IUCLID-aligned JSON preview.
notes: Consultation-oriented exchange may proceed only as a staged JSON preview and not as a submission-capable package.

profiles.intendedUse: Pre-XML staging gate for a future EU submission-capable export pathway.
notes: This profile is intentionally strict and is expected to fail for current model families until a submission-capable engine and direct mappings exist.
